Rifle_Hunting.description: A semi-automatic rifle, ideal for big game hunting.
Rifle_Hunting.flavorText: An ancient hand-wrought weapon design, adapted to a new frontier.

Herbalism_Bench.flavorText: Once the realm of witches and shaman, herbalism offers useful wisdom to those who can discern basic science from hocus pocus.

Rug_Desert_Wolf.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Paste_Health_Regen.description: A herbal confection that speeds healing.
Paste_Health_Regen.flavorText: The lily\'s high concentration of bioactive ingredients is thought to inhibit the reuptake of certain cytochromes, briefly flooding your body with oxidating enzymes.

Paste_Health_Buff.description: An organic preparation that temporarily increases health.
Paste_Health_Buff.flavorText: Like so many things on Icarus, the exact ingredients would probably render this concoction illegal on Earth.

Paste_Health_Restore.description: An organic fusion that restores health.
Paste_Health_Restore.flavorText: The combination of Icarus\'s unique conditions and genetic adjustments to plant life has seen the addition of \'useful\' methyl chains to many previously innocuous plant-based preparations.

Heavy_Glass_Window.description: A heavy duty, highly durable window.

Bandage_Heat.description: Cloth bandages impregnated with a warming salve, for treating frosty and frostbite.

Hunter_Head.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Hunter_Head.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Hunter_Chest.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Hunter_Chest.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Hunter_Arms.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Hunter_Arms.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Hunter_Legs.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Hunter_Legs.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Hunter_Feet.description: Lightweight camouflage, reduces visibility to wildlife, but gives little protection or warmth.
Hunter_Feet.flavorText: Take the effort out of hunting.

Heater_Large.description: A powered heating device for warming larger areas.

Cooler_Large.description: A powered heat exchange unit for cooling larger areas.

Concrete_TrapDoor.flavorText: May be attached to a floorpiece with a trapdoor accessway.

Thermos_GreenTea.description: A nourishing, warming drink that soothes the spirit.
Thermos_GreenTea.flavorText: Arguably humanity\'s single greatest contribution to the galaxy.

Thermos_Cocoa.description: A savory chocolate drink that slows hunger, and warms.
Thermos_Cocoa.flavorText: In the absence of sugar, Icarus\'s cocoa drinks return to a classical, savory \'Spanish\' style.

Thermos_Coffee.flavorText: If it didn\'t shield you from the leaden weight of fatigue, it wouldn\'t be coffee.

DesertWolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

DesertWolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Hyena.
DesertWolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Yield_Fertilizer.description: Increases the yield of your crops
Yield_Fertilizer.flavorText: Fertilizer is a multivitamin for your plants

Mission_Laser_Part_1.description: The base for a high-powered heating device
Mission_Laser_Part_1.flavorText: An excellent example of sturdy construction

Mission_Laser_Part_2.description: The arm for a high-powered heating device
Mission_Laser_Part_2.flavorText: Keep fingers and toes clear from all moving parts

Mission_Laser_Part_3.description: The laser for a high-powered heating device

Meta_Module_Beta.description: Enables prospectors near you to heal from afflictions faster. Buff does not apply to the wearer.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Damage_1.description: An attachment that increases both projectile and critical damage.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Damage_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Animal_Hightlig.description: An attachment that highlights your target when aiming.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Animal_Hightlig.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid rifle.

Hearty_Salad.description: Gives a boost to health and stamina.

Health_Enhancement_Tonic.description: Providing a decent amount of health recovery.
Health_Enhancement_Tonic.flavorText: When it comes to survival, prospectors on Icarus try everything.

Heavy_Obsidian_Head.description: An incredibly tough piece of armor that provides a high level of protection against fire and lava.
Heavy_Obsidian_Head.flavorText: Heavy and bulky, but that\'s a small price to pay for not being on fire.

Heavy_Obsidian_Arms.description: An incredibly tough piece of armor that provides a high level of protection against fire and lava.
Heavy_Obsidian_Arms.flavorText: Heavy and bulky, but that\'s a small price to pay for not being on fire.

Heavy_Obsidian_Chest.description: An incredibly tough piece of armor that provides a high level of protection against fire and lava.
Heavy_Obsidian_Chest.flavorText: Heavy and bulky, but that\'s a small price to pay for not being on fire.

Heavy_Obsidian_Legs.description: An incredibly tough piece of armor that provides a high level of protection against fire and lava.
Heavy_Obsidian_Legs.flavorText: Heavy and bulky, but that\'s a small price to pay for not being on fire.

Heavy_Obsidian_Feet.description: An incredibly tough piece of armor that provides a high level of protection against fire and lava.
Heavy_Obsidian_Feet.flavorText: Heavy and bulky, but that\'s a small price to pay for not being on fire.

Farming_CropPlot_T4_v2.description: An advanced option for the busy farmer. Supports inputs from both Power and Water networks for increased crop growth speed. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Farming_CropPlot_T4_v2.flavorText: Can be connected to both a water and a power network

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Sandworm.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with temperature regulation.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Sandworm.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Honeycomb.description: A raw source of food that can be processed into Honey and Beeswax using a Mortar and Pestle, or Beehive Extractor.
Honeycomb.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Honey.description: Freshly processed Honey, ready to eat or add to your food.
Honey.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Smoked_Bacon.description: Delightfully smoked bacon infused with honey.

Honey_Pastry.description: A baked good generously drizzled with honey.

Honey_Mead.description: Delicious Honey Mead, a refreshing treat.

Honey_Bar.description: A sweet and tasty snack for your travels.

Honey_Tea.description: A mild honey tea with small health benefits.
Honey_Tea.flavorText: Nothing is better than the smell of fresh honey tea on a cold winters night.

Saddle_Cart_Harvest.description: A cart when pulled by an animal will attempt to harvest fully grown nearby plants.
Saddle_Cart_Harvest.flavorText: Can be pulled by a tamed Buffalo or Tusker.

Animal_Bed_Heated.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Heated.flavorText: Only the best of the best for your precious pet.

Hitching_Post.description: A small structure that allows you to hitch animals to it.
Hitching_Post.flavorText: Feels like a real ranch now.

CreatureBait_Hyena.description: Can be used in a Snare Trap to attract and capture wild Hyenas. Only effective in Desert or Volcanic biomes.

Health_Remedy.description: Providing a small amount of health recovery.
Health_Remedy.flavorText: When it comes to survival, prospectors on Icarus try everything.

Health_Elixir.description: Providing a huge amount of health recovery.
Health_Elixir.flavorText: When it comes to survival, prospectors on Icarus try everything.

Black_Wolf_Trophy_Howl.description: A preserved Black Wolf, that once lived on Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Trophy_Howl.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Hanging.description: A preserved Scorpion, that once lived on Icarus.
Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Hanging.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Slug_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Hammerhead Creature.

Slug_Attachment.description: An attachment that imbues your attacks with slowing effects and increases your resistance to slows.
Slug_Attachment.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor at an Alteration Bench.

Slug_Trophy_Vial.description: A preserved specimen from a Hammerhead that once lived on Icarus.
Slug_Trophy_Vial.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Slug_Trophy_Habitat.description: A preserved specimen from a Hammerhead that once lived on Icarus.
Slug_Trophy_Habitat.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Slug_Trophy_Coil.description: A preserved specimen from a Hammerhead that once lived on Icarus.
Slug_Trophy_Coil.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Slug_Grenade.description: A sticky grenade that will attach to whatever it lands on and then explode shortly after, leaving behind a pool of slime obtained from a Hammerhead slug.
Slug_Grenade.flavorText: A grenade crafted from the spoils of victory against a Hammerhead.

Slug_Axe.description: An Axe crafted from the spoils of victory against a Hammerhead.
Slug_Axe.flavorText: An item that was truly hard-won.

Slug_Slime.description: A glob of slime taken from the body of a great beast.

Slug_Skin.description: A piece of skin taken from the body of a great beast.

Lava_Hunter_Magma.description: A piece of tough magma taken from the body of a great beast.

Lava_Hunter_Horn.description: A piece of horn taken from the body of a great beast.

Slug_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Slug_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mission_Medical_Device.description: Health Examination & Analysis Lens. Hold to scan prospectors and see their ailments.
Mission_Medical_Device.flavorText: XIGO\'s latest innovation for the furtherment of medical technolgies.

LegendaryWeapon_LavaHunter_Flamethrower.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Flamethrower created via studying of the Lava Hunter.
LegendaryWeapon_LavaHunter_Flamethrower.flavorText: Norex just wants to watch the world burn.

Homestead_Food_Silo.description: Great storage place for large quantities of plants and food.
Homestead_Food_Silo.flavorText: Every Farm needs one of these.

Homestead_Quilted_Bed.description: A comfy quilted bed, made of perfectly stained wood.

Homestead_Pitchfork.description: A farming tool which combines the functionality of a sickle with the stabbing of a spear.

Homestead_Swing_Chair.description: A Cosy Chair perfect for Decorating.
Homestead_Swing_Chair.flavorText: Would look good on a balcony.

Homestead_Soft_Sofa_Single.description: A soft armchair which can be used to relax.

Homestead_Soft_Sofa_Double.description: A soft sofa which can be used to relax.

Homestead_PlanterBox_SML.flavorText: A raised planting bed brings the food to you, slowly.

Homestead_Spawn_Blocker_Scarecrow.description: A fiber filled Scarecrow, can be used to create a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its small radius. Requires Spoiled Meat to Function.
Homestead_Spawn_Blocker_Scarecrow.flavorText: Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...

Homestead_Water_Tank.description: A large water tank for storing water.

Homestead_Cabinet.description: A simple cabinet, suitable for any cozy home.

Homestead_BirdFeeder.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.
Homestead_BirdFeeder.flavorText: Be careful what you attract on Icarus. Use R to swap between floor and wall mounted.

Homestead_Sewing_Machine.description: A rustic bench where you can craft and assemble various protective items and garments.
Homestead_Sewing_Machine.flavorText: Basic fabric, leatherwork and armorer\'s tools allow you to fashion a range of clothing and protective wear from natural materials and fibers.

Homestead_Vintage_Jar.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Honey_Pot.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Coffee_Grinder.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Butter_Churn.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Butter_Churn_Large.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Hanging_Meat.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Rocking_Chair_Single.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Rocking_Chair_Double.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Picnic_Table.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Lamp_Ground.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Lamp_Wall.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Prop_Propaganda_Sign.description: A helpful sign - brought to you by the UDA.

Mission_DNA_HomogenizedSample.description: Ground up sample of Garganutan tissue.

Mission_DNA_Heated_Lysate.description: Heated facilitating in the process of protein denaturation.

Homestead_Fireplace.description: A delightfully rustic fireplace, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Fireplace_Ext.description: A delightfully rustic fireplace extension, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Fireplace_Cap.description: A delightfully rustic fireplace cap, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Hay_Bale.description: A bundle of hay perfect for decorating.

Homestead_Wall_Candle.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Copper_Pot.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Cushion_A.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Cushion_B.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Lantern.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Fireplace_Tools.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Fireplace_Screen.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Fireplace_Bellows.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Knitting_Decor.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Birdbath_Iron.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Birdbath_Gold.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Well.description: A simple and durable way to collect rain water.
Homestead_Well.flavorText: Water can be consumed directly from the reservoir, or it will refill an equipped container.

Homestead_Spinning_Wheel.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Kitchen_Sink.description: Fully plumbed basin and running water, a luxury of sorts.

Homestead_Kitchen_Storage.description: A compact module for all your kitchen storage needs.

Homestead_Kitchen_Corner.description: Can be used to make unique kitchen designs.

Homestead_Kitchen_Butchery.description: A modular workspace for working with all kinds of meat products.
Homestead_Kitchen_Butchery.flavorText: Be careful, the knives are sharp.

Homestead_Kitchen_Herbalism.description: Used for creating tonics, pills and other medicines.

Homestead_Shutter.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Curtain.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Saloon_Door.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Cuckcoo_Clock.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Weather_Vane.description: A delightfully rustic piece of decor, perfect for your cozy homestead.

Homestead_Iron_Stove.description: An efficient, wood burning cooking unit.

Honeycomb_Stack.description: A raw source of food that can be processed into Honey and Beeswax using a Mortar and Pestle, or Beehive Extractor.
Honeycomb_Stack.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.
